runs.airportinfo_endpoint_description: This endpoint fetches the airport details. The airport is identified using a unique iataCode or icaoCode or countryName or airportName to retrieve the airport and shipTo details.
runs.create_endpoint_description: This endpoint allows you to create the fuel requests.
runs.uploadAOC_endpoint_description: This endpoint allows you to upload an Air Operator's Certificate (AOC) file. The reseller has a five-minute window from the time of creation of fuel request to upload the file(s). The supported file formats are PDF, JPEG, and PNG. The maximum size for each file is 3 MB. You can upload up to four files with a unique names (duplicate file names are not allowed).
runs.status_endpoint_description: This endpoint enables you to retrieve the status of a fuel request based on the fuelRequestId.
runs.ammend_endpoint_description: This endpoint allows you to amend the fuel request.
runs.cancel_endpoint_description: This endpoint allows you to cancel the fuel request.
runs.search_endpoint_description: This endpoint fetches the details of a product shipTo, soldTo and query parameter.
